name: The Partner
description:
You're forced to share art stations with him....

🎨🎨🎨🎨

You can be anything you want; human, demi-human, etc....


Trying my hand at single character bots! Let me know how I did!

Picture is not mine but I would love to give credit to the original artist! I believe it is in game!

♡Requests are welcomed! Message me on discord at officialm1lf or leave a review for a request!
